title: Structure Profile
description: Phase 2 structure profile for an LCC node type (.profile.yaml). Contains event role declarations and conditional relevance rules.

schemaVersion.description: Schema version. Currently must be '1.0'. The app ignores unrecognized fields for forward compatibility (additional properties are allowed).

nodeType.description: Node type identification used for profile matching by the app.

manufacturer.description: Manufacturer name exactly as reported in the node's SNIP data (e.g., 'RR-CirKits').

model.description: Model name exactly as reported in the node's SNIP data (e.g., 'Tower-LCC').

firmwareVersionRange.description: Optional firmware version range. Advisory only — does not gate profile application. A mismatch is logged but the profile is still applied.

min.description: Minimum firmware version this profile is known to be accurate for (inclusive). Null means no lower bound.

max.description: Maximum firmware version this profile is known to be accurate for (inclusive). Null means no upper bound.

eventRoles.description: Event role declarations. Each entry declares all eventid leaves in a named CDI group as either Producer or Consumer. Profile-declared roles override any heuristic or protocol-exchange-derived role.

groupPath.description: Name-based CDI group path using '/' to join hierarchy levels. Use '#N' ordinal suffix (1-based) to distinguish same-named sibling groups within the same parent. Example: 'Port I/O/Line/Event#1' selects the first <group name="Event"> child of Line.

role.description: The role assigned to all eventid leaves within this group and all its replicated instances.

relevanceRules.description: Conditional relevance rules. Each rule declares that a CDI section becomes irrelevant when a controlling sibling field has one of the listed values.

id.description: Unique rule identifier within this profile file (e.g., 'R001'). Used in log warnings when a rule is skipped.

affectedGroupPath.description: Name-based CDI path of the group rendered irrelevant when the rule fires. Same '#N' ordinal notation as groupPath in eventRoles.

allOf.description: List of conditions that must ALL be true for the section to be irrelevant. V1: only single-entry lists are evaluated. Rules with 2+ conditions are silently skipped with a log warning.

field.description: CDI display name of the controlling field — a sibling within the same replicated group instance as the affected group (e.g., 'Output Function').

irrelevantWhen.description: Integer enum values of the controlling field that render the affected section irrelevant. These are the raw <property> values from the CDI <map>.

explanation.description: User-facing explanation shown VERBATIM in the UI banner when the rule fires. The app must not paraphrase or substitute this text. Write it as a complete sentence that a model railroader can understand without knowing CDI terminology.
